reasoning: Premarket sector internals show classic risk-off rotation: XLK -0.33% and XLF -0.43% while XLE essentially flat at -0.13%. Both tech and financials selling into the open despite SPY holding flat overnight (+0.41c gap). Two largest SPY weightings rolling over signals narrow leadership, not broad support. Medium confidence — sector alignment is clear but moves are modest (<0.5%), and energy isn't confirming the risk-off. Intraday pressure expected as market opens.
key_observations: XLK: -0.33% — tech selling in premarket; largest SPY weighting under pressure
XLF: -0.43% — financials also lower; two major sectors aligned bearish
XLE: -0.13% — energy flat, not confirming risk-off but not contradicting it
Overall rotation: Risk-off setup. Tech and financial weakness despite flat SPY gap = narrow leadership. Intraday directional pressure likely toward the downside.
